2603.20273.title: Efficient AI-Driven Multi-Section Whole Slide Image Analysis for Biochemical Recurrence Prediction in Prostate Cancer
2603.20273.paper_summary: Prostate cancer is one of the most frequently diagnosed malignancies in men worldwide. However, precise prediction of biochemical recurrence (BCR) after radical prostatectomy remains challenging due to the multifocality of tumors distributed throughout the prostate gland. In this paper, we propose a novel AI framework that simultaneously processes a series of multi-section pathology slides to capture the comprehensive tumor landscape across the entire prostate gland. To develop this predictive AI model, we curated a large-scale dataset of 23,451 slides from 789 patients. The proposed framework demonstrated strong predictive performance for 1- and 2-year BCR prediction, substantially outperforming established clinical benchmarks. The AI-derived risk score was validated as the most potent independent prognostic factor in a multivariable Cox proportional hazards analysis, surpassing conventional clinical markers such as pre-operative PSA and Gleason score. Furthermore, we demonstrated that integrating patch and slide sub-sampling strategies significantly reduces computational cost during both training and inference without compromising predictive performance, and generalizability of AI was confirmed through external validation. Collectively, these results highlight the clinical feasibility and prognostic value of the proposed AI-based multi-section slide analysis as a scalable tool for post-operative management in prostate cancer.
2603.20273.paper_summary_zh: 前列腺癌是全球男性中最常被診斷的惡性腫瘤之一。<lb/>然而，由於腫瘤在前列腺內的多發性分佈，精確預測根治性前列腺切除術後的生化復發（BCR）仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種新穎的人工智慧框架，該框架同時處理一系列多切片病理幻燈片，以捕捉整個前列腺的綜合腫瘤景觀。<lb/>為了開發這一預測性人工智慧模型，我們整理了一個包含789名患者的23,451張幻燈片的大規模數據集。<lb/>所提出的框架在1年和2年的BCR預測中顯示出強大的預測性能，顯著超越了既定的臨床基準。<lb/>經過驗證，人工智慧衍生的風險評分在多變量Cox比例風險分析中被確認為最有效的獨立預後因素，超越了傳統的臨床標記，如術前PSA和Gleason分數。<lb/>此外，我們證明了整合補丁和幻燈片子抽樣策略在訓練和推理過程中顯著降低計算成本，而不影響預測性能，並通過外部驗證確認了人工智慧的通用性。<lb/>總體而言，這些結果突顯了所提出的基於人工智慧的多切片幻燈片分析在前列腺癌術後管理中的臨床可行性和預後價值，作為一種可擴展的工具。
2603.20273.author: Yesung Cho et.al.
2603.20273.authors: Yesung Cho, Dongmyung Shin, Sujeong Hong, Jooyeon Lee, Seongmin Park, Geongyu Lee, Jongbae Park, Hong Koo Ha
